top_stories.title: Bank of Japan Policy Board Member Hints at Near-Term Rate Hike Potential
top_stories.summary: BoJ board member Seiji Adachi stated interest rates could rise if the yen's weakness accelerates inflation beyond expectations, boosting financials in Tokyo.

top_stories.title: China's Ultra-Long Bonds Rally on Expectations of More Monetary Stimulus
top_stories.summary: State-backed financial institutions are stepping up purchases as market yields drop below key key psychological benchmarks, indicating persistent deflationary vibes.

top_stories.title: Asian Tech Stocks Ride Nvidia's Momentum to Break Key Resistance Levels
top_stories.summary: TSMC, Advantest, and Tokyo Electron lead broad gains across Asian chip supply chains after Nvidia's stellar financial performance and outlook.

latest_news.title: India's foreign exchange reserves hit record high of $650.8 billion
Yen hovers near 156.50 marking multi-decade lows vs US Dollar
Australia's consumer price index accelerates to 3.6% in April
Singapore manufacturing sector contracts unexpectedly in Q1 review

top_stories.title: US Officials Arrive in Beijing for High-Stakes Financial Working Group Talks
top_stories.summary: Delegates from the Treasury and Federal Reserve meet Chinese counterparties in Beijing to discuss financial stability and international cross-border payments.

top_stories.title: European Union Prepares Stiff New Tariffs on Chinese Electric Vehicles
top_stories.summary: The European Commission is nearing a decision to impose preliminary duties on cheap Chinese electric cars entering the European single market.

top_stories.title: Australia's Treasurer Outlines Inflation Mitigation Details in Federal Budget
top_stories.summary: Treasurer Jim Chalmers says government cost-of-living relief is designed in direct compliance with primary anti-inflation measures.
